title: NIMASA DG Congratulate Former President  Muhammed Buhari On Birhday
description: Happy Birthday wishes for His Excellency Muhammadu Buhari. GCFR Immediate past President, Federal Republic of Nigeria From NIMASA DG Dr Bashir Yusuf Jamoh OFR Jamoh says Buhari’s love for Unity of Nig
html:
Happy Birthday wishes for His Excellency Muhammadu Buhari. GCFR
Immediate past President, Federal Republic of Nigeria From NIMASA DG Dr Bashir Yusuf Jamoh OFR

Jamoh says Buhari’s love for Unity of Nigeria is well documented through his service as a Military Head of State and later a two term democratically elected President of the Federal Republic of Nigeria.The NIMASA DG noted that Most importantly Buhari’s zeal towards ensuring that democracy is sustained in Nigeria remains one of the greatest gift given to the most populous African nation.

In his words “Your commitment to nation building and the attendant achievements has evenly matched the most celebrated nation builders across the globe.

On this special day of yours I want to wish you many more years of happiness in sound health as we will continue to seek your unquantifiable advice in our quest for National development, Jamoh stated .
